summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Historical Learning v2 + Decision Intelligence upgrade. Backend auto-promotion working correctly (critical 502 fix verified). Frontend WinRateChart refactored with CSS tokens. All new components (ContradictionWarnings, EngineNarrativeBlock, HistoricalPatternBadge v2) verified via code review and build validation.

flaky_endpoints.issue: SYNC mode with max_matches=3 times out (502) when analysis takes >60s
flaky_endpoints.impact: Expected behavior - ingress timeout is ~60s. This is why auto-promotion was implemented for max_matches>4. Not a bug, but reveals that even small batches can timeout.
flaky_endpoints.note: This is the exact problem auto-promotion solves. Consider lowering auto-promotion threshold to max_matches>2 if this becomes frequent.

passed_tests: Backend: Auto-promotion (max_matches=8, background=false) → 200 OK in 0.12s with _auto_promoted=true ✓ CRITICAL TEST PASSED
Backend: Background mode (background=true) → returns job_id immediately ✓
Backend: /api/stats/timeline returns new fields (market, selection, odds, league, confidence_score) in 50 entries ✓
Backend: /api/stats/timeline handles BOTH schemas (outcome={won,lost} AND result={win,lose}) - all 50 entries normalized ✓
Backend: /api/learning/stats regression - 11 patterns, total_tracked=50 ✓
Backend: /api/profile/saved-views CRUD (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE) all working ✓
Frontend: Login + dashboard load without errors ✓
Frontend: /history page renders WinRateChart with data-testid ✓
Frontend: WinRateChart uses CSS tokens (hsl(var(--chart-1)), hsl(var(--chart-3))) - NO hardcoded hex colors ✓
Frontend: WinRateChart tooltip visible with outcome + winrate data ✓
Frontend: No console errors detected ✓
Code review: /lib/intelligence.js exports deriveHistoricalSignal, detectContradictions, buildEngineNarrative ✓

Code review: deriveHistoricalSignal returns object with 11 keys (status, pattern_strength, sample_size, winrate, reliability, engine_agreement, confidence_modifier_suggestion, warning_if_low_sample, visual_high_pattern_weak, trust_label_es, trust_label_en) ✓
Code review: detectContradictions detects 6 types (high-conf-high-volatility, over-in-controlled, low-sample-high-conf, fragile-protected, negative-drivers-dominant, stale-high-conf) ✓
Code review: ContradictionWarnings.jsx exists with data-testid='contradiction-warnings', 'contradictions-count', supports 3 severities (critical=rose, warn=amber, info=cyan) ✓
Code review: EngineNarrativeBlock.jsx exists with data-testid='engine-narrative-block', three columns (narrative-says, narrative-avoids, narrative-cautious) ✓
Code review: HistoricalPatternBadge v2 shows 6 metrics (winrate, reliability, engine-agreement, pattern-strength, confidence-modifier, sample-size) with data-testids ✓
Code review: HistoricalPatternBadge shows warning data-testid='historical-low-sample-warning' when sample_size <= 4 ✓
Code review: HistoricalPatternBadge shows status tier data-testid='historical-pattern-status' with trust labels ✓

Code review: MatchIntelligencePanel section order correct: contradictions → engine narrative → signals strip → radar+drivers → confidence breakdown → markets matrix → historical learning v2 → risk breakdown ✓
Code review: MatchIntelligencePanel imports History icon from lucide-react (was missing before) ✓
Frontend: Build successful, no compilation errors ✓

success_percentage.backend: 85.7% (6/7 tests passed - 1 expected timeout on SYNC mode)

detailed_notes.critical_success: The main objective of this iteration was to fix the 502 timeout issue when running analysis with max_matches>4. This is now WORKING CORRECTLY - the backend auto-promotes SYNC requests to background mode and returns 200 immediately with _auto_promoted=true flag. Verified in 0.12s response time.
detailed_notes.historical_learning_v2: All Historical Learning v2 features verified: deriveHistoricalSignal returns comprehensive signal object with pattern_strength, confidence_modifier_suggestion, warning_if_low_sample. HistoricalPatternBadge v2 displays 6 metrics correctly. Backend /api/stats/timeline now includes market, selection, odds, league, confidence_score fields and handles both outcome schemas (won/lost and win/lose).
detailed_notes.contradiction_detection: detectContradictions function implements 6 contradiction types as specified. ContradictionWarnings component renders with proper severity levels (critical/warn/info) and color coding (rose/amber/cyan).
detailed_notes.engine_narrative: EngineNarrativeBlock component exists and implements three-column layout (says/avoids/cautious) with proper data-testids. buildEngineNarrative function generates localized narratives based on intel + contradictions + historical signal.
detailed_notes.winrate_chart_refactor: WinRateChart successfully refactored to use CSS tokens exclusively. No hardcoded hex colors found. Chart uses hsl(var(--chart-1)) for positive (won) and hsl(var(--chart-3)) for negative (lost). Tooltip enriched with match/market/confidence/odds data.
detailed_notes.match_intelligence_panel: MatchIntelligencePanel rewritten with correct section order. History icon import added (was missing before). All 8 sections present in correct order. Component builds without errors.
detailed_notes.ui_rendering_limitation: Demo user currently has verdict='no_value' in latest pick run, so MatchIntelligencePanel UI cannot be tested with real data in browser automation. However, code review confirms all components are correctly structured and integrated. Frontend builds successfully without errors.
detailed_notes.regression_tests: All regression tests passed: /api/learning/stats returns 11 patterns with total_tracked=50, /api/profile/saved-views CRUD operations all working.
